verses.text: Tua ahih manin ka hong it lawmte aw, pumpi leh lungsim a ninsak theite khempeuh panin kisian'suahin, Pasian zahtakna tawh nungta-in siangtho sinsenin om ni.
Kuama tungah kote hong khiallo, kuamah hong siasaklo, noptaksa-in kuama tungah hong gamtalo ka hih manun na lungsim uh hong pia un

Hih bang ka hong cih ciangin note mawhsak nopna tawh thu a hong gen ka hi kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hong gensa mah bangin note hong it mahmah ka hih manun note na hin' uh leh hingkhawm, na sih uh leh zong a sikhawm ngam ka hi uh hi
Note hong muang mahmahin note hangin ka kisathei a, lungkhamna a tuamtuam ka tuah hangin lunghimawh loin ka lungnuam mahmah hi
Masedonia gam ka tun'khit uh ciang nangawnin tawldam cih om thei tuanlo a, a koimah peuhah kitotna leh lungkhamna om kawikawi ahih manin lungsim patauhna hi tawntung hi
Ahi zongin a lungkia mite a hanthawn Pasian in Titus hong tun'na tawh kote hong thakhauhsak hi

Ama hong tun'na hang bek zong hiloin ama lungsim a thahatna dingin note' gamtatna zong a hong zasak hi. Note in kei na hong muhnopna thu uh, note na dahna thu uh leh kei na hong hutnopna thu uh hong gen ahih manin ka lung a dam semsem hi
Ka hong laigelhna in note tawlkhat sung a hong dahsak manin ka lungsim nuamlo ahi tei ta zongin tua ka hong laigelhna hangin ka kisik kei hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-in ka lung a dam hi. Note ka hong dahsak khakna hangin a lungdam hiloin note na dahna hangun na ngaihsutna uh kheel thei na hih manun a nuam ka hi hi. Tua na dahna uh Pasian in a hoihlamin hong zang ahih manin note-a' dingin siatna a hong piangsak ka hi kei zaw uh hi

Tua na dahna uh hotkhiatna ngahtheihna dingin na lungsim uh na kheelna dingun Pasian in hong zang ahih manin dahna ding bangmah omlo hi. Ahi zongin hih leitung dahna lelte in ahih leh sihna piangsak hi

Hih note' dahna pen Pasian in a hoihlamin hong zatsak ahih manin mawk om nawnloin lungsim takpi tawh kinna na nei uh a, hoihlo hi, ci-in ka hong gente lunghimawhin sian'sak nopna lungsim na nei uh hi. A thupiangsate hangin lau-in lunghimawhin a hoihlote gim na pianuam uh hi. Hih thu khempeuhah note na paubaan'na ding uh a omlo hong suaksak hi

Tua bangin lai ka hong gelh hangin a khialpa ahih kei leh a thuakpa ngaihsutna tawh hong gelh hilo zaw-in, Pasian' thu sungah kote' thu bangzahin na hong mang uh hiam cih a kitheihna dingin a hong gelh ka hizaw uh hi

Tua ahih manin tu-in ka lung uh nuam mahmah hi. Kote' lungsim hong nuamsak bek hiloin, Titus lungsim a noptheihnadingin ama tungah na gamta na hih manun ama lungdamna in zong kote' lungdamna hong behlapto sawnsawn hi

Titus mai-ah note ka hong kisialhpih ngei a, note in ka kisialhna thu-ah kei na hong zahhuaisak kei uh hi. Note tungah thuman bekbek a hong gen ka hih mah bangun Titus tungah ka kisialhna uh zong a kisial khial ka hihlohna uh hong kilang hi
Note in ama thu mangin, launa leh lin'na tawh amah na zindona uh a ngaihsut ciangin Titus in note hong itna khang semsem hi
Note hong muang mahmah ka hih manin ka lungsim a nuam hi.
